title: Origin Realms Beyond
description: Bringing optimized performance and quality-of-life features for the way different Origin Realms Server gameplay
body:
![Large Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92784b83d1ca073c80f3186bb4c192f831646363_0.webp)


Origin Realms Beyond modpack is designed to bridge the gap between vanilla performance and high-end cinematic gameplay on [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com/) Minecraft Server. Featuring 110+ client and server mods/resourcepacks which change visuals, performance, and adds quality-of-life features all while staying true to the server’s unique gameplay

‎
![Features Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eb8000ea32dd2c9684df37b94d418be5352779e.png)


### ⚙️ **REIMAGINED MENU**

<details>
<summary>A fully redesigned, dark-mode focused UI</summary>

**Used Mods:** [FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu), [Drippy Loading screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/drippy-loading-screen), [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark-refined), [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)

</details>

![Custom Origin Realms UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ed868ed975ef3b85598f80c36217fdb9493038_0.webp)



### 🏞️ VISUAL OVERHAUL

<details>
<summary>Cinematic gameplay with advanced audio and visuals</summary>

**Used Mods:** [Simple Fog Control](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-fog), [Dynamic Surroundings](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamicsurroundingsfabric), [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain), [Biome Particle Weather](https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-particle-weather), [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular), [Perception](https://modrinth.com/mod/perception), [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds), [Smooth Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-skies), [Clear Void](https://modrinth.com/mod/clear-void), [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds), [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement), [Subtle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects), [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality), [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes), [Particle Interactions](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-interactions), [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps), [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items), [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations), [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-moves), [Mining Quakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/mining-quakes)

</details>

![ORB Visuals Overhaul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b615c61e97025c06299ddc479d474998b91eab4.png)


### 📚 USER GAMEPLAY INTERFACE OVERHAUL

<details>
<summary>Dynamic user's inventory, containers and surroundings</summary>

**Used Mods:** [Smooth GUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-gui-animations), [Obscure Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/obscure-tooltips), [Inventory Particles](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-particles), [Bedrock Inventory Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/bia), [Armor Trim Item Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/armor-trim-item-fix), [Better F1 Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-f1-reborn), [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3), [Better Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-tab), [Leawind's Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/leawinds-third-person), [Auto Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/auto-third-person), [Overflowing Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars), [Pick Up Notifier](https://modrinth.com/mod/pick-up-notifier), [Item Highlighter](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-highlighter), [Status Effect Timer](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-timer), [FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu)

</details>

![Unique Dark x Origin Realms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b6637e8befc5ab6fba77f50a00794e16f9e074c.png)



### 🛠️ QUALITY OF LIFE FEATURES

<details>
<summary>Utilities for simple and quick access to client/server features</summary>
  
**Used Mods:** [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential), [Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker), [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling), [VisualKeys](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-keymap), [Chat Binds](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatbinds), [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [ClickThrough Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough+), [Client Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-time), [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) (with [Easy Item List](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-item-list)), [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils), [Show Me Your Skin!](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-me-your-skin), [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)

</details>

![EMI Beyond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/022e472478d5159dcaa82931ffb0b49800465718.png)

### 🚀 OPTIMIZATION

<details>
<summary>Optifine Features, game optimization and critical fixes</summary>
  
**Used Mods:** [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton), [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix), [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast), [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-culling), [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-block-entities), [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity), [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/model-gap-fix), [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights), [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-texture-features), [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer), [No Telemetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-telemetry), [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-crashes)
‎

</details>

![Origins Beyond Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29d3b323f91bbc4b9e89bd25eecd3f8c7537351d_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>System Requirements</summary>
  
**Minimum:**
- OS: Windows 10  (64-bit)
- CPU: Intel Core i3 (6th Gen) / AMD Ryzen 3 (1st Gen) or equivalent
- RAM: 4GB
- Java: 21

**Recommended:**
- OS: Windows 10  (64-bit)
- CPU: Intel Core i5 (9th Gen) / AMD Ryzen 5 (3000 Series) or newer
- Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 10-Series / AMD RX 500 Series or newer
- RAM: 6-8GB
- Java: 21
</details>

**Note:** "Origin Realms Beyond" Modpack is not an official server modpack. We are not officially affiliated with the Origin Realms staff or development team. This modpack is built by the community, for the community

### Join ORB Discord for feedback and bug reports
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1346027647762694194?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&color=5865F2&label=DISCORD)](https://discord.gg/evGvsajjWP)
